text: Your money and your wallet used to live in different buildings. As of today they share an address, and the doors I'm watching aren't the ones we just opened.

classification.rationale: The opening image — two buildings merging into a shared address — is Adream (Weight+Flow): yielding, structural-metaphorical, image-led rather than will-led. 'Your money and your wallet used to live in different buildings' is soft, relational, body-nearby but ultimately dreamy. The second clause pivots sharply: 'the doors I'm watching aren't the ones we just opened' — a cool, self-withholding aside that withholds conclusion. That closing turn flashes a Remote Unsociable beat (Space+Flow, carved-off). Primary tempo: Irradiant (Adream Light+Free, expansive-yielding). Aspect penetrating because the structural spatial metaphor (different buildings → shared address) is Space-led. Stress: space (the metaphor orients spatially). Pole: flexible (the floating-to-flick trajectory, imagery meanders). No Weight evidence for Strong motors — the prose is imagistic and buoyant, not forceful. Motor: floating→flicking (Light+Flexible).
classification.literary_anchor: Blanche DuBois describing a place she once lived

text: For most of my career, your bank held the money and somewhere else did the work. Send from your bank to Infinex now and that line isn't there. The interesting question is what we open next.

classification.rationale: The dominant register is Stable Light+Direct: 'For most of my career… Send from your bank to Infinex now and that line isn't there' — a calm, settled, institutional observation. No muscular will asserted against resistance; this is Direct settled awareness, not commanding. Self-Contained (Stable, Light+Direct+Sustained) fits the measured, career-retrospective framing. Aspect penetrating: space-led structural insight ('that line isn't there'). Stress: time — the temporal arc ('for most of my career… now') is the carrying frame. Pole: sustained (unhurried, biographical). The closing 'The interesting question is what we open next' flashes an Awake Acute beat — alert, scanning forward. Motor: gliding (sustained preparation) → dabbing (the clean, light, direct landing of 'now'). No Weight evidence for Strong.
classification.literary_anchor: Werle in Act I — reflective institutional candor

text: The chore of moving money from where it sits to where it works was always yours. Starting today it isn't a move, and it isn't a chore. Bigger doors after this one.

classification.rationale: The opening 'The chore of moving money from where it sits to where it works was always yours' is body-forward, relational, empathetic — Near (Weight+Time) territory. But the Weight here is not asserted will; it's the gentle mass of lived burden felt on behalf of the user. Near + flow stress → Warm (Near, Light+Flexible+Sustained, the empathic pole). Aspect circumscribing (Time-led — the temporal framing 'always yours → Starting today it isn't' wraps the moment). Stress: flow (yielding, emotion-visible continuity of burden release). Pole: free (unclenching, liberating). 'Bigger doors after this one' flashes an Irradiant (Adream Light+Free expansive) beat — a lifting, future-reaching close. Motor: gliding (sustained, gentle clearing) → floating (expansive, lifted). No Strong-Weight evidence.
classification.literary_anchor: The Nurse — taking a weight off your shoulders in a single breath

text: Spot trading on Hyperliquid is coming to Infinex, and the wall between spot and perps is coming down with it — one account, one balance, one click to switch sides.

classification.rationale: The sample announces structural collapse of a boundary ('the wall between spot and perps is coming down') and delivers three parallel 'one X' clauses — settled, alert, orienting. This is Awake (Space+Time): the reader is shown the lay of the land precisely. The 'wall coming down' could suggest Weight, but no will is asserted against resistance — it's a fact being reported with calm specificity. Certain (Awake, Direct+Sustained awareness). Aspect penetrating (Space-led: the structural spatial metaphor of wall/account/balance). Stress: space (the parallel tricolon orients structurally). Pole: direct (clean, no ambiguity). Motor: gliding (sustained setup) → dabbing (the crisp landing 'one click to switch sides'). No Strong-Weight evidence.

text: Hyperliquid spot is coming to Infinex without the second wallet, without the transfer step, without the tab-juggling — spot and perps share the same balance now, and switching is a click.

classification.rationale: The triadic negation ('without the second wallet, without the transfer step, without the tab-juggling') is architecturally precise — each clause removes a friction point from the spatial map. This is Awake/Certain: Direct settled awareness, scanning and clearing the landscape clause by clause. No will asserted; no force against resistance — this is structural cognition (Space). Penetrating aspect (Space-led analytical stripping). Stress: space. Pole: direct. Final 'switching is a click' is the clean Dab: Light+Direct+Quick. Motor: gliding (the sustained negative sweep) → dabbing (the quick landing). No Strong-Weight evidence.

text: Hyperliquid spot is coming to Infinex on the same account as your perps — same balance, no transfer in between, one click to move between them. The seam is just gone.

classification.rationale: 'The seam is just gone' — the most compressed spatial-surgical statement of the three variants. The sample maps a structural change ('no longer the only… seated next to it… handles where it goes') with quiet, direct, settled confidence. Awake Certain: alert awareness of what is now true. No assertion of will or force. Aspect penetrating (Space-led: the seam metaphor is a spatial cut). Stress: space. Pole: direct. Motor: gliding (sustained setup of facts) → dabbing (the abrupt, clean 'the seam is just gone'). No Strong-Weight evidence.

text: Synthetix takes a seat on the perps bench inside Infinex, sitting alongside Hyperliquid. Pick a market; the routing is already handled.

classification.rationale: 'Synthetix takes a seat on the perps bench inside Infinex, sitting alongside Hyperliquid. Pick a market; the routing is already handled.' The sporting/institutional metaphor ('takes a seat on the bench') carries light structural authority — Stable (Weight+Space). The sample is brief and decisive: 'Pick a market; the routing is already handled' — this is done, sorted, handled. Practical (Stable, Strong+Direct+Quick) is the closest fit: things are sorted efficiently and there is a small note of resolved will ('already handled'). Aspect circumscribing (Time-led: the quick imperative 'Pick a market' wraps the action). Stress: time (quick resolution). Pole: quick. Motor: pressing → punching (Practical's canonical strong pair, the sorted-and-done decisiveness). Weight evidence is marginal but present in the institutional resolution — 'already handled' implies prior Pressing effort now complete.
classification.literary_anchor: Aragorn dispatching logistics before the march

text: The perps floor inside Infinex now has a second venue under it: Synthetix sits next to Hyperliquid, and which one carries the trade is no longer the user's problem.

classification.rationale: 'The perps floor inside Infinex now has a second venue under it: Synthetix sits next to Hyperliquid, and which one carries the trade is no longer the user's problem.' Architectural, measured, spatially precise — Stable (Weight+Space), Light register. The spatial/structural metaphor ('floor… under it… sits next to') is Space-led. Self-Contained (Stable, Light+Direct+Sustained): the settled institutional announcement that removes a problem without fanfare. No will asserted; no urgency. Aspect penetrating (Space-led: the 'floor beneath' structural image). Stress: time (the 'now' and 'no longer' mark a temporal hinge). Pole: sustained (measured, unhurried). Motor: gliding (calm sweep of the structural setup) → dabbing (the clean light 'no longer the user's problem'). No Strong-Weight evidence.

text: Hyperliquid is no longer the only perps venue underneath Infinex. Synthetix is seated next to it; the user picks a market, the platform handles where it goes.

classification.rationale: 'Hyperliquid is no longer the only perps venue underneath Infinex. Synthetix is seated next to it; the user picks a market, the platform handles where it goes.' Direct, settled, factual — Awake Certain. Spatial metaphors ('underneath', 'seated next to') carry structural precision. No will imposed; no urgency; no force. The sample simply registers what is now true and where things stand. Aspect penetrating (Space-led: the spatial architecture of the venue arrangement). Stress: space. Pole: direct. Motor: gliding → dabbing (Light+Direct preparation → clean landing). No Strong-Weight evidence.

text: Twenty-plus chains, one motion. The seam where you used to stop and choose a route is closed; the quotes have been compared, the slippage set, the path picked. You move. That's swidge.

classification.rationale: 'Twenty-plus chains, one motion. The seam where you used to stop and choose a route is closed; the quotes have been compared, the slippage set, the path picked. You move. That's swidge.' The passive-perfect stack — 'have been compared, set, picked' — is the signature of prior Pressing effort now resolved into a decisive Punch. 'You move.' is the punched output. Stable + Weight-active: there is genuine resolved will here — the system has done the heavy lifting (mass/exertion language: 'slippage set, path picked'). Practical (Stable, Strong+Direct+Quick): efficient, decided, no-fuss delivery of a done thing. Aspect circumscribing (Time-led: the whole thing is framed around the instant of movement — 'one motion', 'You move'). Stress: time (the urgency/immediacy of 'You move'). Pole: quick (the Punch landing). Motor: pressing (the preparation stack of comparisons/settings) → punching (the delivered 'You move. That's swidge.'). The closing definitional beat 'That's swidge' flashes an Awake Certain moment.
classification.literary_anchor: Aragorn: 'The beacons are lit' — systems aligned, the action is already done

text: There used to be two verbs and two interfaces between any token here and any token there. Now there's one motion across twenty-plus chains, with the routing, the quotes, and the slippage already decided. Swidge.

classification.rationale: The copy enacts a structural reduction — 'two verbs and two interfaces' collapsed into 'one motion' — this is Space-led (orientation, cognition, scanning) with a Weight undertow: there's genuine resolve in the architectural claim ('routing, quotes, slippage already decided'). The inner attitude reads Stable (Weight+Space): intelligent ruler, decisions taken, a problem solved. The stress is Time (the before/after narrative arc, the final one-word landing 'Swidge' as a quick decisive close). The pole is Sustained — the prose moves with deliberate, considered build toward that landing, not a quick percussion. The dominant tempo is Practical (Stable Light+Direct+Sustained → Gliding→Pressing continuum, the craftsman-expert, p. 494). The load-bearing test: the resolve here is structural/decisional ('already decided') — this is closer to a settled, expert claim than a volitional 'we will impose' will-against-resistance, so Practical (rather than Commanding) wins. The final one-word 'Swidge.' flashes Certain (Awake) — a brief settled-awareness punctuation — recorded as a transient outer moment.
classification.literary_anchor: Werle presenting the solution / the engineer who has already done the calculation

text: Any token, any of twenty-plus chains, to any token, any chain — in one motion. The routing's been solved, the quotes compared, the slippage set. You arrive where you meant to. Swidge.

classification.rationale: This sample is even more crystalline than the previous — the syntax itself is Direct: list-like, parallel, each clause closing a door ('routing's been solved, quotes compared, slippage set'). The dominant register is Awake (Space+Time): alert, sensing, registering settled facts. Aspect is Penetrating (Space-led: structural orientation, scanning the architecture of the solved problem). Stress is Space, pole Direct — each clause is a clean spatial placement of a fact. Motor reads Light: Gliding (sustained certainty) into Dabbing (the clean final 'You arrive where you meant to. Swidge.' — quick, precise, placed). There is no Strong-Weight evidence: no asserted will against resistance, no force. The commanding-vs-certain test: this registers settled awareness, not volitional pressure → Certain (Awake). Practical (Stable) flashes as a transient outer moment in the middle section — the craftsman's inventory ('routing solved, quotes compared') reads briefly as expert Stable-D before resolving back to Awake certainty.
classification.literary_anchor: The strategist who has already mapped the territory and simply states what is

text:
Trezor is in the portfolio, sitting next to Ledger. Same view, same surface, signing on its own device.
Which brand of cold key you hold stops deciding where you spend your day.

classification.rationale: The copy describes a spatial architecture — Trezor 'sitting next to Ledger, same view, same surface' — and then delivers a quiet structural release: 'Which brand of cold key you hold stops deciding where you spend your day.' The inner attitude reads Stable (Weight+Space): the intelligent ruler who has arranged the room and states what that arrangement now means. The tone is withholding rather than imposing — Light-Weight Stable, i.e. Self-Contained (the quietly self-sufficient expert, p. 494, not Commanding). Stress is Time (sustained — the build across the two sentences, the long exhale of 'stops deciding where you spend your day'). The final line flashes Certain (Awake: settled awareness, spatial orientation) as a transient outer moment. Motor: Gliding (the smooth spatial narration) building into Pressing preparation (the Weight of that final clause's structural assertion). Load-bearing test: 'stops deciding where you spend your day' carries mild volitional weight (a resolved structural imposition — 'your brand-lock is now dissolved') but it's narrated calmly, not asserted urgently — Self-Contained rather than Commanding.
classification.literary_anchor: Duke of Dark Corners / the offstage arranger who states the new order quietly

text:
Open the portfolio. Trezor is there, next to Ledger, the device still holding the keys and signing each transaction itself.
The surface bends to whichever one you brought.

classification.rationale: This sample is the most body-forward of the set: 'the device still holding the keys and signing each transaction itself' — there's a tactile, held-object quality (near-Weight) but also an architectural placement ('Open the portfolio… Trezor is there, next to Ledger'). The inner reads Stable (Weight+Space) — the intelligent arrangement — but the aspect shifts to Enclosing (Weight-led): the emphasis is on the device itself holding, the physical act of signing, the enclosed certainty of keys-on-device. Stress is Flow, pole Bound — the prose has a slow, contained, accumulative quality; each clause wraps tighter around the object ('device still holding… signing each transaction itself… the surface bends'). The final line ('the surface bends to whichever one you brought') is a Stable accommodation, not a rupture. Dominant tempo: Self-Contained (Stable, quietly sovereign, Light-to-moderate Weight, Gliding→Pressing). No transient outer flashes — this reads single-register.
classification.literary_anchor: Werle in a domestic scene: the room arranged, the objects in their places, nothing needs explaining

text:
A Trezor in the portfolio reads the same as a Ledger. Balances on the surface, keys on the device, every signature still made there.
Cold storage no longer picks the app for you.

classification.rationale: This is the most crystalline of the three Trezor samples — almost a technical specification: 'reads the same as a Ledger', 'Balances on the surface, keys on the device, every signature still made there.' The syntax is Direct placement of facts: each clause maps a spatial partition (surface vs. device, app vs. storage). The dominant register is Awake (Space+Time): alert spatial registration, not volitional. Aspect is Penetrating (Space-led — each clause cuts to structural orientation). Stress is Space, pole Direct. Motor: Light — Gliding (sustained spatial narration) into Dabbing (the crisp final sentence 'Cold storage no longer picks the app for you' — quick, placed, final). Load-bearing test: 'Cold storage no longer picks the app for you' is a settled structural fact, not an asserted will. Commanding-vs-certain: settled awareness → Certain (Awake). Self-Contained (Stable) flashes briefly in the middle technical inventory — the craftsman's calm arrangement of the architecture — recorded as transient outer moment.
classification.literary_anchor: The technician who maps the room and states what each surface holds — no drama required
